title: alyssum tenuifolium
intro: Alyssum tenuifolium, also known as sweet alyssum or white alyssum, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of alyssum tenuifolium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety, and promote relaxation, likely due to its sedative properties. Alyssum tenuifolium can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are often used to support the immune system and alleviate stress.
